top_signals.title: Gathering Clouds: Building Digital Strategic Depth in the Compute Age
top_signals.summary:
The wars in Ukraine and the Middle East have exposed a strategic reality that military planners are only beginning to confront: In a data-centric age, digital infrastructure has become part of the battlespace. Data centers and cloud regions are now the digital backbone of military power and economic prosperity. As such, they present attractive targets for rapidly proliferating long-range strike systems, drones, and cyber capabilities. As the protective value of physical distance erodes, strategic depth — once conceived in geographical terms — must now be measured in the resilience of data and compute.Alex Rough detailed the physical vulnerability of data

The post Gathering Clouds: Building Digital Strategic Depth in the Compute Age appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Panetta Sees Fragile Outlook With Risks to Inflation, Growth
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank is navigating an uncertain economic situation even as the US and Iran move closer to a lasting peace deal, according to Governing Council member Fabio Panetta.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin bulls shake off Strategy's $216M BTC sale as price overtakes $64K
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin reversed course from its Monday open selloff and closed the day above $64,000 as bulls began to price in Strategy’s selling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. loses to Belgium 4-1; Balogun plays after Trump calls FIFA
top_signals.summary: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium over objections.
